text.title: Crossplane Composition for Self-Service Infra Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Developers reach into raw `Composition` objects; contract drifts.
antipattern.root-cause: Composition without an XRD claim surface.
antipattern.fix: Define XRD; gate access via XRC claims only.

antipattern.symptom: Long-lived AWS key leaked from a Crossplane secret.
antipattern.fix: Move to IRSA / Workload Identity short-lived creds.

antipattern.symptom: Developer claims a 32xlarge RDS — surprise $30k bill.
antipattern.fix: Add max_* fields enforced by OPA + composition logic.
